lines.text: How bizarre, you're not like the rest of the beings here are you?
Greetings, simian. Would you like to purchase something?

options.label: What makes me not like the rest?

lines.text: I can't quite say, it's as if there is something in you that resembles us more than anything in your world.
I am what you may call an invader, from beyond your world.
Don't be afraid, unlike my peers I do not desire any harm to befall you.
Ah, no, perhaps you have misunderstood, this concept of "planets" is foreign to my kind.
Enough talk now, simian, don't confuse me for a friend. I am simply here to conduct business.
